mubanTitle01: 1. Import up to 200 questions at a time.The types of questions that can be imported with this template include: Multiple Choice, Multiple Response, True/False, Fill-in-the-Blank, Sequence, Essay, and Combination Questions.
mubanTitle02: 2. * Serial Number: used to seperate Combination Questions from other single questions. The Combination Question and the sub-questions
mubanTitle03: 3. * Points: Required, if missing, the default is 2 points (Combination Questions only need to fill in the points of each sub-question)
mubanTitle04: 4. * Difficulty: Divided into 5 levels, 1 =  easiest, 5 = most difficult.
mubanTitle05: 5. Tags: used for searching questions. Enter a # in front of each tag.
mubanTitle06: * Correct Answer: Multiple Choice questions – one letter (uppercase) of A-O; Multiple Response questions – multiple letters (uppercase); Fill-in-the-Blank questions – five consecutive underscores represent a space; True/Flase questions – true or false (true means right, false means error); Sequence questions – A-O alphabetical (uppercase) sorting, separated by ; .
mubanTitle07: 7. * Choices: required for Multiple Choice, Multiple Response and Sequence Questions.  Add up to 15 choices per question.
headerG: Instructions of Combination Question (Required for Combination Question)
signInAfterPositioning: Please complete the positioning before signing in.
examInfoNotMatch: The exam information does not match, please scan the sign-in code for this exam.
unrecognized: Unrecognized, please scan the correct QR code.
QRCodeExpired: The QR code has expired, please scan the code again.
unableSignIn: You are not on the list for this exam.
examHasSignedin: You have signed in for this exam.
teachersHaveNoPermissionGetExamInfo: Teachers who are not part of the course team have no permission to view exam details.
